apps.name: Suno AI
apps.description: Generates complete songs with vocals from text prompts, easy to use, and offers a mobile app. However, lyrics can be generic, and customization is limited beyond prompts. Offers licensing for commercial use based on subscription tiers.

apps.name: Udio
apps.description: A main competitor to Suno AI, offering text-to-music and audio-to-audio AI music extension. It is known to stay closer to the initial audio file, making it helpful for musicians seeking a coproduction tool for writing music accompaniment.

apps.name: Mubert
apps.description: Generates royalty-free music from text prompts suitable for podcasts and YouTube videos, offering a balance between quality and ease of use. It also allows generating music from images. Licensing is clear for commercial use.

apps.name: Soundraw
apps.description: Focuses on creating custom, royalty-free music tracks, allowing users to blend genres and customize song structures with AI-powered editing tools. Emphasizes ethical AI music generation.

apps.name: Boomy
apps.description: Offers an extremely low barrier to entry for creating original music, allowing users to generate songs with just a few clicks and potentially collect royalties. However, it has faced scrutiny regarding streaming spamming.

apps.name: Beatoven AI
apps.description: Generates royalty-free music for videos and podcasts, allowing users to customize tracks by specifying duration, vibe, and instruments. Has 'Fairly Trained' certification for ethical AI development.

apps.name: Riffusion
apps.description: Generates music using images of sounds and allows users to enter song lyrics to generate vocals and background music. Offers a mobile app focused on photo-to-song but retains text-to-music features.

apps.name: Kits AI
apps.description: Provides AI voice tools for music production, including pitch correction, vocal isolation, stem separation, and AI mastering. Allows users to create AI singing clones and offers a royalty-free library of AI voice generators.

apps.name: AIVA (Artificial Intelligence Virtual Artist)
apps.description: Functions as an AI music composition assistant that produces original soundtracks in more than 250 styles. It offers tiered pricing with expanding usage rights, including full copyright ownership on the Pro tier.

apps.name: Moises
apps.description: Offers AI audio separation, allowing users to easily separate vocals, drums, guitar, and other instruments in any song. It also includes smart metronome, audio speed changer, pitch changer, and AI key detection features.

apps.name: WavTool
apps.description: An AI DAW with a GPT-4 music production assistant, allowing users to create music tracks, add effects, and compose MIDI. It excels at prescriptive instructions.

apps.name: Controlla Voice
apps.description: Allows users to transform their voice to ultra-realistic AI singing voices and instruments, create massive choirs, and swap any song to their own voice in any language. Also offers stem splitting.

apps.name: LALAL.AI
apps.description: Provides AI-powered stem splitting and noise canceling across multiple platforms (iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux). It allows extracting up to 10 stems.

apps.name: ACE Studio
apps.description: Focuses on AI voice processing rather than full song generation. It offers AI-powered stem splitter and Vocal to MIDI & lyrics model, which can make the singing voice of any song editable.

apps.name: Uberduck
apps.description: Enables creating music with AI by generating unique songs in any style using AI music studio. Users can use any voice, including their own, to create a song in seconds.

apps.name: Amadeus Code
apps.description: Known for advanced AI music features, allowing users to create original music.

apps.name: Endlesss
apps.description: A collaborative music platform that combines AI-driven music generation with real-time jamming capabilities. It allows users to create and remix music loops and collaborate with other musicians in real-time.

apps.name: Humtap
apps.description: An AI-driven music creation app that allows users to create original tracks using their voice and gestures. It uses machine learning algorithms to interpret vocal melodies and movements, generating corresponding musical elements.

apps.name: Mureka
apps.description: Transforms musical inspiration into polished tracks by letting users train personalized AI models with their own uploaded music. It offers precise region editing and song extension features.

apps.name: Landr
apps.description: Automates mixing, mastering, and sound design, allowing users to make professional music without expensive gear or years of training.
